case_title: KIMBERLY COX et al VS. SAN FRANCISCO SCHOOL OF DIGITAL FILMMAKING

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,390.00 FILED BY COX, KIMBERLY PARRISH, JIMMEY A. AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO SCHOOL OF DIGITAL FILMMAKING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-21-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-21-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-21-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFFS (2) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY JEREMIAH BIRNBAUM--PRESIDENT. BOTH CROSS--DEFENDANTS WAIVE SERVICE IN COURT TODAY ON THE DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT ON THE PLAINTIFFS CLAIM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT SAN FRANCISCO SCHOOL OF DIGITAL FILMMAKING RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT COX, KIMBERLY PARRISH, JIMMEY A. $3,520.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,570.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-21-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-21-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFFS (2) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY JEREMIAH BIRNBAUM--PRESIDENT. BOTH CROSS--DEFENDANTS WAIVE SERVICE IN COURT TODAY ON THE DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT ON THE PLAINTIFFS CLAIM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-21-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COX, KIMBERLY PARRISH, JIMMEY A. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO SCHOOL OF DIGITAL FILMMAKING STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF DEC-03-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-03-2015 BY PRO TEM JUDGE ELLIOTT MYLES (DEPT. 525).
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF DEC-03-2015 - JUDGMENT ENTERED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT SAN FRANCISCO SCHOOL OF DIGITAL FILMMAKING TAKE NOTHING FROM APPELLANT COX, KIMBERLY PARRISH, JIMMEY A. CROSS-CLAIM JUDGMENT IS ORDERED IN FAVOR OF S.F. SCHOOL OF DIGITAL FILMMAKING AND AGAINST KIMBERLY COX AND JIMMY PARRISH IN THE AMOUNT OF $3,114.96 PRINCIPAL, $0.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $50.00 COSTS, $0.00 INTEREST FOR A TOTAL AMOUNT OF $3,164.96. TERMS/OTHER ORDERS: EACH PLAINTIFF OWES $1,557.48 IN TUITION TO DEFENDANT. THE JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IF FINAL AND REPLACES THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF 09/21/2015. BOTH PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS ARE RETAINED. PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $388.47 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO PLAINTIFF COX, KIMBERLY PARRISH, JIMMEY A.

WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $3,768.23 FOR THE WRIT ISSUED ON: 03/30/2017 AS TO PLAINTIFF COX, KIMBERLY PARRISH, JIMMEY A.
